'''Ace Squadron''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] equipped with [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]] that served with the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]]. It was commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Pash Cracken]], son of [[Contruum/Legends|Contruum]] native and chief of [[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]].

Ace Squadron was originally part of a [[Fighter wing/Legends|fighter wing]] known as [[Cracken Flight Group|Cracken's Flight Group]], made up of the former [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] pilots who had defected to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] alongside Cracken, but attrition forced the remaining pilots to be consolidated into a single squadron. This reconstituted Ace Squadron was assigned to [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Varth]]'s wing.

==Appearances==
